basic_details.short_information: Chaudhary Bansi Lal University (CBLU) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 7 Non-Teaching Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 10-06-2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: No minimum or maximum age limit is specified in the official notification. Age relaxation details are not provided.

qualification.education_qualification: Candidate already holding same post in same pay level or analogous post or one post lower subject to fulfilment the qualification of the said post
qualification.details: Assistant Librarian: Candidate already holding same post in same pay level or analogous post or one post lower subject to fulfilment the qualification of the said post. Assistant Director Sports: Candidate already holding same post in same pay level or analogous post or one post lower subject to fulfilment the qualification of the said post. SDO (Civil): Candidate already holding same post in same pay level or analogous posts. Accounts Officer: Candidate already holding same post in same pay level or analogous posts. Security Officer: Candidate already holding same post in same pay level or analogous posts. Junior Engineer (Civil): Candidate already holding same post in same pay level or analogous posts. Junior Engineer (Electrical): Candidate already holding same post in same pay level or analogous posts.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CBLU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://cblu.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CBLU Non-Teaching Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the CBLU Non-Teaching Posts is 10th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Non-Teaching Posts at CBLU?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for various Non-Teaching Posts at Chaudhary Bansi Lal University (CBLU).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for CBLU Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for the Assistant Librarian post?
faq.answer: Candidates already holding the same post in the same pay level or an analogous post, or one post lower, subject to fulfilling the qualification of the said post, are eligible.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for CBLU Non-Teaching Posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Junior Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Junior Engineer (Civil) and Junior Engineer (Electrical) posts is FPL-6.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these Non-Teaching Posts at CBLU primarily involves Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for CBLU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Non-Teaching Posts at CBLU is Deputation.

faq.question: Q10. Which city is CBLU located in?
faq.answer: Chaudhary Bansi Lal University (CBLU) is located in Bhiwani, Haryana.
